# USELESSKEY-ADR-0000: Short ADR Title

## Decision

State the durable architecture decision.

## Context

Why this decision exists.

## Consequences

What this enables and constrains.

## Required Evidence

What proof or receipts must exist before this decision can be treated as
implemented?

## Claim Boundary

What public claims this decision may support, and what it does not prove.
